jobs.title: Field Marketing Manager [gn] EMEA
jobs.description: The EMEA Field Marketing Manager will join Actian’s marketing team to support awareness, demand generation, and pipeline development across the EMEA region, with a primary focus on the UK and Southern Europe. This role is responsible for executing regional marketing programs, including field events, sales-aligned campaigns, digital marketing activities, regional PR and influencer initiatives, and…
jobs.why: This is a regional field marketing role focused on events, but you can position your direct-response copywriting to support their digital demand generation and event follow-up campaigns.
jobs.proposal_opener: Events get prospects in the room, but high-converting copy keeps them in your pipeline. I write the direct-response email sequences and digital campaign copy that turn Actian's regional event leads into active sales opportunities.
jobs.flags: senior field marketing role - position as a remote copywriting asset to support their digital campaigns and event follow-ups
jobs.summary: This role involves executing regional marketing programs, field events, and sales-aligned campaigns across the EMEA region to drive pipeline development. It requires coordinating both offline events and digital marketing activities to support regional sales teams.
